quoteFirst: At last everything was ready, and he was very pleased with his appearance. The big leather riding-boots that went with the dress were just a little too large for him, and he could only find one of the two horse-pistols, but, on the whole, he was quite satisfied, and at a
quoteLast: he glided out of the wainscoting and crept down the corridor. On reaching the room occupied by the twins, which I should mention was called the Blue Bed Chamber, on account of the colour of its hangings, he found the door just ajar.
title: The Canterville Ghost
author: Wilde, Oscar, 1854-1900; Goldsmith, Wallace, 1873-1945 [Illustrator]

quoteLast: I felt a shock and heard the same screeching noise that I had heard in my dream and knew at once what had happened. Immediately the stewart came running into the stateroom calling, "Everybody up! take nothing along.

quoteFirst: "Treachery, dear mamma!" cried she. "Wenceslas, after giving me his word of honor that he would not go near Madame Marneffe, dined with her last night, and did not come in till a
quoteLast: in the morning.--If you only knew! The day before we had had a discussion, not a quarrel, and I had appealed to him so touchingly.

quoteFirst: He came and he waited just two hours and a quarter, as he tells me, being certain to the time within five minutes. That brings, us to a
quoteLast: --the time when he finds he is robbed; and he came downstairs in a very agitated state at a quarter-past one, as I have since ascertained. At two I pass and see him still dancing distractedly on the front steps--certainly very much like a man who has had a serious misfortune, or expects one.
title: The Red Triangle: Being Some Further Chronicles of Martin Hewitt, Investigator

quoteLast: . So far there was nothing whatever. But I had started two or three men meanwhile making inquiries at the railway stations, and so on. I had scarcely left the Eastern Consolidated when one of them came after me with news.
